queue.title: Versus: SteelSeries Apex 3 TKL vs Redragon K552
queue.description: Budget keyboard comparison: entry-level membrane vs budget mechanical. Strong search volume from gamers choosing their first mechanical keyboard.

queue.title: Versus: Razer Kraken V3 vs Corsair HS65 Wireless
queue.description: Mid-tier wireless headset comparison under $100. High-volume search terms for budget wireless headset buyers.

queue.title: New Game: Color Sequence Memory
queue.description: Simon-says style color memory game. 4-color grid flashes a sequence, player must repeat it in order. Starts at length 3, increases each round. High score tracked.

queue.title: Versus: LG 27GP950-B vs Samsung Odyssey G7
queue.description: 4K/1440p high-end monitor comparison. LG Nano IPS 4K vs Samsung curved 1440p. Target enthusiast monitor buyers.

queue.title: New Game: Gaming Crossword
queue.description: Daily mini-crossword with gaming-themed clues (game titles, characters, publishers, gaming terms). 5x5 or 7x7 grid. Seeded daily so everyone gets the same puzzle.
